'''Oversector Outer''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Oversector/Legends|Oversector]] containing most of the [[Sector/Legends|sectors]] and regions in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]], including the [[Seswenna sector/Legends|Seswenna sector]] and the [[Velcar Free Commerce Zone]]. It was created with the massive expansion of the [[Greater Seswenna/Legends|Greater Seswenna]] Oversector after the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. The Oversector Outer was patrolled by the [[Outer Rim Imperial Fleet]].

==History==
A creation recommended by the [[Tarkin Doctrine/Legends|Tarkin Doctrine]], this [[Oversector/Legends|Oversector]] composed almost the entirety of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]]. It was assigned to [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[Wilhuff Tarkin/Legends|Wilhuff Tarkin]] and, after Tarkin's [[Death/Legends|death]], to Grand Moff [[Ardus Kaine]].

After the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], Kaine maintained control over the Outer Rim part of the [[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]] and transferred the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of Oversector Outer from [[Eriadu/Legends|Eriadu]] to [[Entralla/Legends|Entralla]]. With this small part of the Oversector Outer, he formed the [[Pentastar Alignment]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].

==Astrography==
===Oversector Outer until the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]===
*Almost all the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Planet/Legends|worlds]] in the Outer Rim Territories (excluding worlds in the [[Bright Jewel Oversector/Legends|Bright Jewel]] and [[Quelii Oversector]]s).<ref name="TEA" />
